title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXX. Relics.
content:
Daffy-down-dilly has come up to town,
        In a yellow petticoat, and a green gown.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXX. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
